description: Enterprise-grade luxury hospitality SaaS platform representing ONE heritage luxury property.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Perfect alignment, editorial grid logic, ample negative space.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4F46E5] text-white rounded-[20px] px-8 py-3 shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0F172A] border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-[20px] px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#FAFAF8] transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-[20px] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E2E8F0] overflow-hidden

glassmorphism.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-[20px]

inputs.style: bg-[#FAFAF8] border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-[12px] px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4F46E5]/20 focus:border-[#4F46E5] outline-none transition-all text-[#0F172A]

animations.hover: Smooth transform translations and subtle box-shadow expansions.
animations.page_load: Fade in and slight slide up (Framer Motion recommended).

1_homepage.hero: Cinematic heritage palace photography with dark cinematic overlay (bg-black/30). Editorial heading centered or perfectly left-aligned. 'Book Your Stay' primary CTA.
1_homepage.booking_widget: Floating glassmorphism container overlapping the hero section. Contains Date pickers, guests, promo, and search CTA.
1_homepage.sections: Property Highlights (bento grid), Featured Rooms (carousel of large cards), Experiences grid, Testimonials, Gallery, Footer.

2_rooms_suites.layout: Editorial banner followed by an asymmetric or elegant grid of room categories. Full detail cards with rich imagery.

3_guest_booking.layout: 2-column layout. Left: Guest Details Form (use error colors for validation), Upsell Section (cards for Breakfast, Spa, etc.), Booking Policies Accordion. Right: Sticky Booking Summary.

4_payment.layout: Minimal luxury. Centered payment container. Tabs for methods. Secure badges. Success modal with confetti and QR code.

5_confirmation.layout: Celebration illustration, Reservation ID prominently displayed (JetBrains Mono), timeline, weather widget.

6_guest_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (luxury styling, subtle active states). Main area: Upcoming Stay hero card with countdown, booking history table, loyalty points.

7_experiences.layout: Editorial hero. Large cards for Heritage Walk, Royal Dinner, etc. Modal for details.

8_dining.layout: Restaurant hero with chef recommendation. Menu categories. Reserve table form.

9_spa.layout: Tranquil imagery. Treatment cards showing duration, price (JetBrains Mono). Available slots picker.

10_gallery_contact.layout: Luxury masonry grid for images. Virtual tour section, map, elegant FAQ accordion, newsletter input.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' (e.g. data-testid='book-now-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure sufficient contrast, especially text over images. Use text-shadow or gradient overlays where necessary.
